basic_details.job_title: Mumbai Port Authority Chief Strategic Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Candidates up to 40 years of age who have a 1-year or 2-year full-time Post Graduation Degree/Diploma in Management from IIM or ISB along with 6 years of relevant post-qualification experience in the Port Sector are eligible to apply for these Chief Strategic Advisor vacancies. The application process for Mumbai Port Authority Chief Strategic Advisor Recruitment 2026 is being conducted in offline mode and will remain open until 18 May 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation is relaxable in deserving cases.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation Degree/Diploma in Management from IIM or ISB
qualification.details: 1-year or 2-year full-time Post Graduation Degree/Diploma in Management from IIM or ISB. 6 years post-qualification experience in the Port Sector specifically in preparing Port Master Plans in the fields of: Business Development, Strategic Management, Logistics, Shipping and Maritime, Port Planning, Port Asset Monetisation.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Mumbai Port Authority Chief Strategic Advisor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.mumbaiport.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mumbai Port Authority Chief Strategic Advisor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Chief Strategic Advisor post is 18th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Chief Strategic Advisor position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a 1-year or 2-year full-time Post Graduation Degree/Diploma in Management from IIM or ISB, along with 6 years of relevant post-qualification experience in the port sector.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Chief Strategic Advisor post is 40 years. Age relaxation may be provided in deserving cases.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Chief Strategic Advisor role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 2,50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Chief Strategic Advisor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Chief Strategic Advisor position in the Mumbai Port Authority.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Chief Strategic Advisor role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written examination and/or an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the Mumbai Port Authority Chief Strategic Advisor recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What specific experience is required for the Chief Strategic Advisor post?
faq.answer: Candidates need 6 years of post-qualification experience in the Port Sector, specifically in preparing Port Master Plans related to Business Development, Strategic Management, Logistics, Shipping, Maritime, Port Planning, and Port Asset Monetisation.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Mumbai Port Authority, www.mumbaiport.gov.in. Direct links are also provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
